'''Gorbu Dalo''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] and the rival of [[Yearo Seville]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[MdZ-BLK]], an unstable [[Droid/Legends|droid]] sent by Seville as a "gift." The [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Siro Simito]] once attacked a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] owned by Dalo.
